modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Touchscreen on HP monitor is unresponsive in Windows.

full_description_text: The touchscreen on my HP monitor is not working. I am unable to interact with the screen. This issue occurs while using Windows. I have tried to touch the screen, but it does not respond at all.
short_description: Touchscreen on HP monitor is unresponsive in Windows.
description: The touchscreen on my HP monitor is not working. I am unable to interact with the screen. This issue occurs while using Windows. I have tried to touch the screen, but it does not respond at all.
